choices.text: Stack-based, no loops, deterministic, intentionally limited (max 10k ops, 1000 stack). Designed for security + predictable execution time. Contrast with Solidity which is Turing-complete with footguns.
OP_2 <pubkey1> <pubkey2> <pubkey3> OP_3 OP_CHECKMULTISIG. Locks output so any 2 of 3 keys can spend. Wrap in P2SH for standard address. Used for cold storage, treasury, escrow.
